title: Wire cost_tracking_wrapper into UI as estimated hourly cost
description: cost_tracking_wrapper.py exists but cost data is not surfaced in the UI. Add an estimated hourly cost display (e.g., small badge near session controls). Plan Change 9.

title: Add auto-deploy step to duck-e-build so image bumps reach ardenone-cluster
description: The running pod on ardenone-cluster (namespace ducke) has been on ronaldraygun/duck-e:0.2.106 for 36+ days while VERSION has advanced to 0.2.124+ via duck-e-build (jedarden/declarative-config k8s/iad-ci/argo-workflows/duck-e-workflowtemplate.yml) — that template builds and pushes the image but never updates k8s/ardenone-cluster/ducke/ducke-deployment.yml, so ArgoCD has nothing new to sync. Add a step to duck-e-build (after docker-build succeeds) that clones jedarden/declarative-config, updates the image tag in k8s/ardenone-cluster/ducke/ducke-deployment.yml to the just-built version, commits (user.email github@jedarden.com, user.name jedarden), and pushes to origin — mirroring the existing pattern already used by telegram-claude-bridge-build and news-trader-build in the same WorkflowTemplates directory. This is a declarative-config manifest/workflow change only; no live kubectl mutation.

title: Show tool call events in chat UI; unify button design
description: Tool call events (web_fetch, voice_change, etc.) should appear as inline chat messages or collapsible entries. Also do a button design consistency pass across the UI. Plan Change 8.

title: Rename ag2client.js to ducke.js and update ag2.init → ducke.init message type
description: Plan Change 1 specified renaming ag2client.js to ducke.js and updating the ag2.init message type to ducke.init. Currently: the file is still named app/website_files/static/ag2client.js, the JS class is 'ag2client', and both backend (realtime_session.py:162) and frontend (ag2client.js:397) still use 'ag2.init'. The plan notes keeping it compatible was acceptable for initial migration but the rename should be completed. Update: (1) rename file, (2) update class name, (3) change message type to ducke.init in both realtime_session.py and the client JS, (4) update any imports/references in chat.html and main.js.

title: Integrate Agentation library for UI element feedback
description: No evidence of agentation npm package in the frontend. Add agentation toolbar to duck-e's web UI so users can click elements and copy CSS selectors as structured markdown for agent feedback. Plan Change 6. See https://github.com/benjitaylor/agentation
close_reason: Already complete - Agentation already integrated via ESM loading

title: Add PVC + REDIS_URL wiring for duck-e durable state (ADR-1)
description: Implements ADR-1 in docs/plan/plan.md. Two manifest-only changes in jedarden/declarative-config under k8s/ardenone-cluster/ducke/: (1) add a 1Gi PVC (storageClassName: nfs-synology, ReadWriteOnce) and mount it at /data/memory in ducke-deployment.yml — app/memory.py already reads/writes that exact path, no app code change needed. (2) set REDIS_URL in ducke-secret pointing at the existing shared Valkey (valkey.valkey.svc.cluster.local:6379, see k8s/ardenone-cluster/valkey/) — app/middleware/cost_protection.py already has a working Redis-backed code path, this is config only. Ship via commit+push to declarative-config and let ArgoCD sync; do not kubectl apply/patch directly. Verify after sync: memory facts and cost-protection counters survive a pod restart (kubectl delete pod, confirm rollout, confirm prior facts still returned by recall_memories).

title: Enable a public, unauthenticated, cost-capped demo instance of DUCK-E
description: k8s/ardenone-cluster/ducke/ducke-vpn-ingressroute.yml and ducke-deployment.yml (jedarden/declarative-config) already contain commented-out IngressRoutes for ducke-demo.ardenone.com and ducke.hardyrekshin.com with no auth middleware — scaffolding for a public demo that was never finished. Given this workspace's pattern of showcasing tools publicly (see palm.jedarden.com, artifacts.hardyrekshin.com), finish this: uncomment/adapt one route, and before enabling it tighten COST_PROTECTION_MAX_SESSION_COST_USD / COST_PROTECTION_MAX_TOTAL_COST_PER_HOUR_USD and RATE_LIMIT_WEBSOCKET (see README env var table) to demo-safe values via a separate low-cap ducke-config/ducke-secret for that route, so a public unauthenticated demo can't run up real OpenAI spend. Manifest-only change plus config value tuning; no app code change needed.

title: Implement PTT (push-to-talk) unit tests and document feature
description: chat.html includes PTT (push-to-talk) controls (.ptt-controls, .ptt-btn, .ptt-toggle) which are not in the original plan. This is an undocumented enhancement. Add: (1) documentation of the PTT feature in CLAUDE.md, (2) unit/integration tests for the PTT toggle behavior, (3) verify PTT mode works correctly with the voice change reinit flow (audio state must be preserved or restarted correctly when voice changes while in PTT mode).

title: Fix stale deployment facts in CLAUDE.md (wrong cluster, wrong registry)
description: This repo's CLAUDE.md Deployment section says 'Production cluster: apexalgo-iad (accessed via kubectl-proxy over Tailscale)' and 'Docker image -> ghcr.io/jedarden/duck-e'. Neither matches reality: the live deployment is on ardenone-cluster, namespace ducke (k8s/ardenone-cluster/ducke/ in jedarden/declarative-config), serving https://ducke.ardenone.com, and the image actually pushed/deployed is ronaldraygun/duck-e:<version> on Docker Hub (see ducke-deployment.yml and the duck-e-build WorkflowTemplate). README.md's docker run example also references ghcr.io/jedarden/duck-e:latest which does not appear to be what's actually published. Update CLAUDE.md's Deployment section and README's Docker quick-start to reflect the real registry/cluster, or add a ghcr.io mirror push to duck-e-build if ghcr.io is meant to be the public pull path for the README's docker run instructions.

title: Add liveness/readiness probes to ducke-deployment.yml
description: k8s/ardenone-cluster/ducke/ducke-deployment.yml (jedarden/declarative-config) defines no livenessProbe/readinessProbe on the duck-e container. app/main.py already exposes GET /status (health check + version) for this purpose per README's API endpoint table. Add both probes pointing at /status so k8s can detect a hung/crashed process and so the RollingUpdate (maxSurge:1, maxUnavailable:0) actually waits for the new pod to be ready before considering rollout progressed. Manifest-only change in declarative-config; ship via commit+push, ArgoCD sync.

title: Wire duck-e /metrics into ardenone-cluster Prometheus via a ServiceMonitor
description: app/main.py exposes GET /metrics (Prometheus format, see README API table and prometheus.yml in this repo), but no ServiceMonitor exists under jedarden/declarative-config k8s/ardenone-cluster/ducke/ — grep for servicemonitor in that directory returns nothing, unlike e.g. k8s/ardenone-cluster/valkey/servicemonitor.yml. Add a ServiceMonitor CR for the duck-e Service (namespace ducke, port 8000, path /metrics) so session/tool-call/cost metrics actually reach the cluster's Prometheus and can back a Grafana dashboard (there's already a grafana-dashboard-valkey.yml pattern to follow under k8s/ardenone-cluster/monitoring/). Manifest-only change in declarative-config.

title: Move footer/version display below the fold in frontend
description: The footer and version badge should be pushed below the fold so they don't occupy prime viewport space. Frontend-only layout change. Plan Change 7.

title: Verify gpt-realtime-2 is the correct OpenAI model identifier
description: Plan Change 2 notes: 'Verify the model name is exactly what OpenAI expects (check API docs for gpt-realtime-2 vs gpt-4o-realtime-preview-2024-12-17 etc.)'. Currently config.py hardcodes 'gpt-realtime-2'. Confirm this is the correct model string by testing against the /v1/realtime/sessions endpoint. If 'gpt-realtime-2' is not valid, update to the correct identifier and document the verified model name in the CLAUDE.md.

title: Add E2E Playwright tests for full voice session flow
description: tests/e2e/test_duck_e_basic.spec.ts exists but appears minimal (only imports Playwright). The plan's testing strategy requires verifying: (Phase 1) WebSocket connects, audio streams, tools execute; (Phase 2) memory persists across sessions, voice changes seamlessly, web fetch returns readable content and rejects private URLs; (Phase 3) tool calls render in transcript, layout scrolls correctly, Agentation toolbar loads. Implement comprehensive E2E tests covering the WebSocket session lifecycle, tool call transcript rendering, cost display update, and voice change reinit flow.

title: Implement Google OAuth for user identity (memory keying)
description: UserMemoryStore is wired and uses forwarded_email header for keying, but there is no Google OAuth provider flow. Implement proper OAuth so memory is keyed to authenticated identity. Plan Change 4.

title: Add unit tests for memory extraction (extract_and_save) and decay logic
description: memory.py implements sophisticated features: (1) LLM-based auto-extraction via extract_and_save() using gpt-5.4-nano, (2) time-based confidence decay with AUTO vs EXPLICIT rates, (3) contradiction detection via LLM comparison. tests/test_memory_extraction.py and tests/test_memory_decay_contradiction.py exist but may be incomplete. Verify coverage of: decay application across periods, contradiction replacement vs refinement, duplicate deduplication, max facts limit enforcement (100), and the extraction prompt returning valid JSON.
